source_note: Keeper Rulebook Chapter 3 Movement Rate table compares STR and DEX against SIZ, then applies the age MOV penalty.

rules.formula: both STR and DEX lower than SIZ -> MOV 7
both STR and DEX greater than SIZ -> MOV 9
STR or DEX equals/exceeds SIZ while the other does not exceed it -> MOV 8
